name: 布里特妮洛夫·史密斯
name_full: 布里特妮洛夫·史密斯 BrittneyLove Smith

last_movies.title: 芝加哥急救 第五季

introduction: Actor BrittneyLove Smith was born in St. Petersburg FL but was raised in Bartlett, IL. At an early age, she took an interest in the arts. She was accepted into the LHS Visual and Performing Arts Academy. Afterward, she attended Columbia College where she received a B.F.A from the Performing Arts Program. Since college, BrittneyLove has had a successful career in Theatre and Film. She was featured in many award-winning theatre productions like "Ruined"," Father Comes Home from Wars," and "Charm". She has now fully transitioned to strictly on-camera work. Since transitioning, she has been in over 15 commercials. BrittneyLove is best known for her leading role in the beloved short-lived series "Velvet" and for playing Stoney in the Film "Roadkill".
